headline: AMD (AMD) Partners With 5C To Build Gigascale AI Campuses
summary: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) and 5C agreed to work together on next generation gigascale AI campuses. The partnership centers on AMD's Helios rack scale platform and aims to support large AI training sites. The collaboration extends AMD's role beyond supplying chips into broader AI infrastructure solutions. For investors tracking AMD, this move highlights how the company is positioning itself across the AI value chain, not just in chips but in full rack scale infrastructure. As AI workloads become...

headline: Cathie Wood's ARK Says AMD Chips 'Can Already Be More Performant Per Dollar' Than Nvidia
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is positioning itself to challenge Nvidia Corp.‘s (NASDAQ:NVDA) long-standing dominance in the lucrative AI accelerator market. According to a fresh analysis released by Cathie Wood‘s ARK Invest, internal research reveals that AMD chips “can already be more performant than Nvidia chips” per dollar on select workloads, highlighting a massive shift in data center cost efficiency.
